name: PostgRestAdmin

aliases.name: AppParams
aliases.type: { init : Json.Decode.Value -> Url.Url -> Browser.Navigation.Key -> ( model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd outerMsg ), view : model -> Html.Html outerMsg, update : PostgRestAdmin.Msg -> model -> ( model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd outerMsg ), subscriptions : model -> Platform.Sub.Sub outerMsg, onUrlRequest : Browser.UrlRequest -> outerMsg, onUrlChange : Url.Url -> outerMsg }

aliases.name: Model
aliases.type: { appUrl : AppUrl.AppUrl, baseUrl : { protocol : Url.Protocol, host : String.String, port_ : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int }, key : Browser.Navigation.Key, notification : PostgRestAdmin.Notification, authFormUrl : Url.Url, authFormField : FormToolkit.Field.Field Basics.Never, authFormStatus : PostgRestAdmin.AuthFormStatus, mountPath : PostgRestAdmin.MountPath.MountPath, menuLinks : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), loginBannerText : Maybe.Maybe String.String, recordsPerPage : Basics.Int, formFields : Dict.Dict String.String (List.List String.String), configErrors : List.List String.String, listing : Maybe.Maybe Internal.PageListing.Model, detail : Maybe.Maybe Internal.PageDetail.Model, form : Maybe.Maybe Internal.PageForm.Model, clientAttributes : PostgRestAdmin.ClientAttributes, client : PostgRestAdmin.Client.Client }

aliases.name: Program
aliases.comment:
An alias to elm's Platform.Program providing the type signature for a
PostgRestAdmin program.

values.name: applyConfiguration
values.type: PostgRestAdmin.Config msg -> PostgRestAdmin.Model -> ( PostgRestAdmin.Model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd PostgRestAdmin.Msg )

values.name: buildAppParams
values.type: { toInnerModel : model -> PostgRestAdmin.Model, toOuterModel : PostgRestAdmin.Model -> model -> model, toOuterMsg : PostgRestAdmin.Msg -> outerMsg, initModel : Json.Decode.Value -> PostgRestAdmin.Model -> model } -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg -> PostgRestAdmin.AppParams model outerMsg

values.name: buildProgram
values.comment: Converts a Config into a Program.

values.name: configure
values.comment:
Creates a default configuration.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configure
            |> PostgRestAdmin.host "http://localhost:3000"
            |> PostgRestAdmin.onLogin loginSuccess
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram

values.name: onAuthFailed
values.type: (String.String -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg) -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg

values.name: onExternalLogin
values.comment:
Subscribe to receive a JWT and a redirect path when login with an external
provider.

See [onAuthFailed](#onAuthFailed).
values.type: (({ path : String.String, accessToken : String.String } -> { path : String.String, accessToken : String.String }) -> Platform.Sub.Sub { path : String.String, accessToken : String.String }) -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg

values.name: onLogin
values.comment:
Callback triggered with a JWT string on successful login.
Typically used to persist the JWT to session storage.

    port loginSuccess : String -> Cmd msg

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.onLogin loginSuccess
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram

Then subscribe to the corresponding port.

    app.ports.loginSuccess.subscribe(jwt => {
      sessionStorage.setItem("jwt", jwt)
    });
values.type: (String.String -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg) -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg

values.name: onLogout
values.comment:
Callback triggered when the user logs out.
You can use this to perform cleanup or external logout operations.

    port logout : () -> Cmd msg

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.onLogout logout
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram

Then subscribe to the corresponding port.

    app.ports.logout.subscribe(_ => {
        externalLogout()
    });
values.type: (() -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg) -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg

values.name: withClientHeaders
values.comment:
Set default HTTP headers to be included in all Client requests. This is
useful for setting headers like `Accept-Profile` or `Content-Profile` when
working with PostgREST schemas.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withClientHeaders
                [ Http.header "Accept-Profile" "bluebox"
                , Http.header "Content-Profile" "bluebox"
                ]
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram
values.type: List.List Http.Header -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg

values.name: withFlags
values.comment:
If set to False no attempt to decode and apply flags will be made.
Defaults to true.


    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withFlags False
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram

    -- Flags are ignored

values.name: withFormFields
values.comment:
Specify which fields should be present in the edit and create forms,
overriding the table schema. By default a primary key field is not present in
the forms.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withFormFields "posts" [ "id", "title", "content" ]
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram
values.type: String.String -> List.List String.String -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg

values.name: withHost
values.comment:
Specify the PostgREST host.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withHost "http://localhost:3000"
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram

values.name: withJWT
values.comment:
Set a JWT to authenticate PostgREST requests. You can set an initial JWT
using this attribute.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withJWT "8abf3a...9ac36d"
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram

values.name: withLoginBannerText
values.comment:
Display a banner text below the login form. The text is rendered as markdown.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withLoginBannerText "**Welcome!** Please login to continue."
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram

values.name: withLoginUrl
values.comment:
Specify the login URL for form authentication.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withLoginUrl "http://localhost:3000/rpc/login"
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram

values.name: withMenuLinks
values.comment:
Pass a list of links to display in the side menu. The list consists of
tuples of the link text and a url.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withMenuLinks [ ( "Api Docs", "/api/docs" ) ]
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram
values.type: List.List ( String.String, String.String ) -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg

values.name: withMountPath
values.comment:
Specify a path prefix for all routes, in case the app is not mounted in the
root path.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withMountPath "/back-office"
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram

values.name: withRecordsPerPage
values.comment:
Set the number of records to display per page in listing views.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withRecordsPerPage 100
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram

values.name: withTableAliases
values.comment:
Rename a table referenced in a foreign key. PostgREST OpenAPI generated docs
confuse tables with views when describing the foreign key for a resource,
because of this some links might be incorrectly generated.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withTableAliases
                (Dict.fromList [ ( "published_posts", "posts" ) ])
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram
values.type: Dict.Dict String.String String.String -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg

values.name: withTables
values.comment:
Pass a list of table names to restrict the editable resources, also sets the
order of the left resources menu.

    main : PostgRestAdmin.Program
    main =
        PostgRestAdmin.configuration
            |> PostgRestAdmin.withTables [ "posts", "comments" ]
            |> PostgRestAdmin.buildProgram
values.type: List.List String.String -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg -> PostgRestAdmin.Config msg

name: PostgRestAdmin.MountPath

unions.name: MountPath
unions.comment:
Represents a path where PostgRestAdmin is mounted.
See [Config.mountPath](PostgRestAdmin.Config#mountPath) to mount it at any
path other than `/`.

values.name: breadcrumbs
values.comment:
Html breadcrumbs for a path prepended by the endpoint.

    myHeader : Html msg
    myHeader =
        Html.header
            []
            [ Html.h1 [] [ Html.text "Some Path" ]
            , breadcrumbs (fromString "admin") "some/path"
            ]
values.type: PostgRestAdmin.MountPath.MountPath -> String.String -> List.List ( String.String, Maybe.Maybe String.String ) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: fromString
values.comment:
Build from `String`.

    fromString "admin" == fromString "/admin"

    fromString "" == fromString "/"

values.name: path
values.comment:
Build a path prepended by the endpoint.

    path (fromString "admin") "some/path" == "/admin/some/path"

values.name: segments
values.comment:
Convert to a list of path segments.

    segments (fromString "/my/mount/point") == [ "my", "mount", "point" ]
